files.tsconfig.json:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{"name": "next"}],
    "paths": {"@/*": ["./*"]}
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules"]
}

files.README.md:
# ATHRX — Founder Control Center v1.2.0

Production-grade executive dashboard for ATHRX operations.

## Setup

```bash
npm install
cp .env.local.example .env.local
```

Configure `.env.local`:

```
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL=https://your-project.supabase.co
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=your-anon-key
ATHRX_FOUNDER_COMMAND_WEBHOOK_URL=   # Optional: enables live dispatch
ATHRX_FOUNDER_COMMAND_WEBHOOK_TOKEN= # Optional: bearer token
ATHRX_FOUNDER_ID=founder             # Optional: identifies command source
```

```bash
npm run dev
```

## Architecture

- All Supabase reads are server-side via `/api/dashboard/*` routes
- Browser polls internal API endpoints only
- `createServerSupabaseClient` used exclusively for data access
- `force-dynamic` set on all data routes

## Supabase Tables

| Table | Fields Used |
|---|---|
| `athrx_pipeline_logs` | id, workflow_name, stage, status, event_type, message, metadata, created_at |
| `athrx_queue` | id, file_id, drive_file_id, status, attempt_count, lease_expires_at, claimed_at, updated_at |
| `athrx_files` | id, drive_file_id, file_name, mime_type, extraction_status, knowledge_status, processed_at, registered_at, updated_at |
| `athrx_execution_log` | id, execution_status, status, worker_id, command, claimed_at, completed_at, created_at, error |
| `athrx_execution_queue` | id, execution_status, status, worker_id, claimed_at, completed_at, created_at |

## Command Dispatch

Commands POST to `ATHRX_FOUNDER_COMMAND_WEBHOOK_URL` with payload:
- `command_id`, `founder_id`, `command_type`, `command_text`
- `requested_action`, `target_workflow`, `urgency`, `issued_at`, `metadata`

If webhook URL is not set, returns `not_dispatched` status without failing.

## Routes

| Route | Page |
|---|---|
| `/` | Executive Overview + What Matters Now |
| `/queue` | Queue Operations |
| `/execution` | Execution Layer |
| `/incidents` | Incidents & Healing |
| `/knowledge` | Drive & Knowledge Indexing |
| `/tasks` | Founder Task Signals |
| `/agents` | Agents & COO Registry |
| `/events` | Event Stream (with stage filter) |
